definition: with consciousness fixed on the self — the cognitive mode where awareness acknowledges its source in the Divine, like a wave knowing it is water.
without fever — the absence of nervous mental agitation about outcomes. The body works; the mind calculates; but the grip of anxiety dissolves.
without expectation — acting without attachment to specific results. The sky doesn't rain expecting gratitude; the sun doesn't shine for appreciation.
having fully renounced — complete surrender of agency, not abandonment of action. Like a symphony musician surrendering to the conductor.
roots: sam (completely) + ni (down) + as (to throw, cast off)

definition: surrender to the Lord — the yogic practice of offering all actions to the Divine. The accelerator of spiritual practice.
